name: Jackie DeShannon
abstract: Jackie DeShannon (born Sharon Lee Myers; August 21, 1941) is an American singer-songwriter, radio broadcaster and actress who has had many hit song credits beginning in the 1960s, as both a singer and composer. She was one of the first female singer-songwriters of the rock and roll period.

works_created.t: Put a Little Love in Your Heart
Put a Little Love in Your Heart
